'''Ushk Choka''' was a [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] sent to pick up [[Nom Anor]] on [[Zonama Sekot/Legends|Zonama Sekot]] after the former [[Executor (Yuuzhan Vong rank)|executor]] promised [[Supreme Overlord]] [[Shimrra Jamaane|Shimrra]] that he would poison the living [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. Ushk Choka brought a lander with 30 [[Warrior caste|warriors]]. It was called the ''[[Red Qurang]]''.
